def positive_sort_then_first_or_membership_only():
    rule_id = "sort_then_first_or_membership_only"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "A collection is sorted even though only the first element or a membership-style check is needed."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
